payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark black leather two-seat reclining couch with segmented padded cushions, stitched seams and high headrests; glossy faux-leather texture, visible right-arm cupholder/storage and floor-level base; mostly visible but slightly left-edge cropped in the image; estimated distance from camera ~2.0 m.
